plugins.name: luly-v0-3-0
plugins.description: Author Luly flows end-to-end from a single natural-language prompt. v0.3.0: open font selection — fontHeading/fontBody may be any Google Fonts family (loaded at render time), brand font used verbatim when captured, bundled families render instantly, SF Pro/Matter retired; heading discipline — simple products use a single H1 + paragraphs, deeper hierarchy reserved for article-like products (writing-guidelines §8).
